label: qwen36_35b_a3b_gguf_q4km_q4ks_final_gate_after_decode_optimizations_4k128

hardware.note: local RX 7900 XTX/gfx1100 final repeated-run gate; W7900 not rerun

retained_changes.summary: GGUF c=1 split-shared cooperative router uses threads=256.
GGUF c=1 selected-MoE decode defaults to direct selected T16 kernels; compact c=1 scheduler remains opt-in via HIPENGINE_GGUF_COMPACT_MOE_C1=1.

correctness_and_dispatch_gate.command: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py tests/test_gguf_t16_selected_gemv_decode.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_decode_graph_policy.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_decode_repack_semantics.py tests/test_qwen35_router_plan.py tests/test_qwen35_linear_attn_conv_plan.py -q
correctness_and_dispatch_gate.coverage_note: Covers dense Q8_0 T16 decode wrappers/dispatch, selected Q4/Q5/Q6 T16 decode kernels, direct/compact MoE routing policy, decode graph policy, decode-repack semantics, router launch plans, and linear-attention conv plan checks.

benchmark_command_common: HIPENGINE_GGUF_AOTRITON_PREFILL=v3 HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run python scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model <model> --quant <gguf_q4_k_m|gguf_q4_k_s> --prompt-length 4096 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json <tmp-json>

comparison.note: PARO comparison is the prior local row, not rerun in this artifact.

decision: Final task #5 gate accepts the current retained GGUF decode state. Q4_K_M and Q4_K_S both pass targeted correctness/dispatch gates, report finite deterministic final logits, keep tracked peak memory unchanged, and improve decode over the pre-router/direct-selected baseline by roughly 3.1-3.2%.
